questionHtml: State whether, for all n>k, the university will have places available for all applicants. Justify your answer.
markschemeHtml:
this will not guarantee enough places.                A1

EITHER

A written statement that un>vn, with range of n.              R1

Example: “when n=24 (or greater), the number of applications will exceed the number of places again” (“un>vn, n≥24”).


OR

exponential growth will always exceed linear growth              R1


Note: Accept an equivalent sketch. Do not award A1R0.

 

[2 marks]

meta.title: State whether, for all n>k, the university will have places available for all applicants. Justify your answer.
